description.ko: 빛이 존재하지 않는 심해의 고요한 장엄함을 탐험하세요. AQUA-5 시리즈의 생물 발광만이 해구의 비밀을 밝혀줍니다.
description.en: Explore the silent majesty of the deep ocean where light ceases to exist, and only the bioluminescent glow of the AQUA-5 series illuminates the mysteries of the trench.

prompt: Cinematic deep ocean abyss, AQUA-5 research station glowing in the dark pressure, bioluminescent flora and fauna, ethereal blue and violet light trails, hyper-realistic water particles, mysterious trench landscape, 8k resolution, futuristic underwater aesthetic
